data.title: E2E: end-to-end tier downgrade rejection and fail-open test
data.description:
## Implementation
Create tests/workflows/test-review-tier-enforcement-e2e.sh with two end-to-end flows:

Test 1 (SC6 — downgrade rejection):
- Set up artifacts dir with classifier-telemetry.jsonl containing selected_tier=standard
- Use write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier light to create findings
- Invoke record-review.sh with --reviewer-hash matching the findings
- Assert: non-zero exit, stderr contains tier mismatch error

Test 2 (SC7 — fail-open):
- Set up artifacts dir WITHOUT classifier-telemetry.jsonl
- Use write-reviewer-findings.sh --review-tier standard to create valid findings
- Invoke record-review.sh with --reviewer-hash matching the findings
- Assert: exit 0, stderr contains warning, review-status contains tier_verified=false

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] E2E downgrade test passes: standard classified, light reviewed → blocked
- [ ] E2E fail-open test passes: no telemetry → allowed with warning
- [ ] .test-index entry maps test to record-review.sh (test name not fuzzy-matchable to source)
  Verify: grep -q "test-review-tier-enforcement-e2e" .test-index
